evidence_contract.question: For exact LGSSM fixtures in dimensions 1, 2, and 3, do CUT4 and the current Zhao--Cui/fixed-design TT artifact lane agree with exact Kalman value and diagnostic score in the same declared four-coordinate unconstrained parameterization?
evidence_contract.baseline_or_comparator: Exact Kalman value and score are the governing baseline; CUT4 uses the same affine structural target; the Zhao--Cui lane is the fixed-design TT retained-density artifact path on the exact highdim LGSSM value path.
evidence_contract.primary_promotion_criterion: Dims 1, 2, and 3 pass value equality, full TensorFlow autodiff score equality, and at least five deterministic directional score residual checks against exact Kalman.
veto_diagnostics: CUT4 padding changes the LGSSM physical target
scalar TT propagation helper mismatch promoted as M1 correctness evidence
nonfinite value, score, covariance, or normalizer
nonclaims: no independent TT-propagated LGSSM likelihood correctness

commands.purpose: Run focused P44-M1 LGSSM value and score evidence for Kalman, CUT4, and fixed-design TT artifact lane.
Compile highdim package and the focused M1 test file.

diagnostics.summary: Local M1 evidence passes after reviewed inert CUT4 padding repair for dim 1. Zhao--Cui evidence is scoped to retained-density TT artifacts on the exact LGSSM path, with an explicit nonclaim for independent TT-propagated LGSSM likelihood.

long_run_controls.resource_caps: No long run; focused local pytest and compile check only.
